Our Story

Trusted by Manufacturers
Across Tirupur

🏪
Sree Bhagavathy Clothing
T N K Nagar, Nesavalar Colony

🧵 Fabric Store 📍 Tiruppur
25+
Years in Business

Sree Bhagavathy Clothing — operating as SBC — is a premier knitted fabric store based in Tirupur, Tamil Nadu, India's garment capital. We specialise in supplying high-quality cotton and blended fabrics to garment manufacturers, exporters, and apparel brands.

From lightweight Single Jersey to heavy Loopknit and Interlock, our range covers every need with superior GSM consistency, rich colourways, and excellent finish.

🏭
